name: Thorfinn Karlsefni | Vinland Saga
description:
Thorfinn is a young Viking that wants nothing more than to avenge his dead father. He's given his entire life to kill Askeladd, maybe you can give him something else to live for?

[Made another Thorfinn bot for people who want to start out as his lover btw]

I really appreciate compliments/constructive criticism on my bots!

Update 4/25/24 - longer initial message, added asterisks
